01 — About

Where Story
meets Strategy

I'm a Digital Marketing Specialist with a deep passion for visual storytelling and content creation. After completing an intensive scholarship at ITI, I channel that energy into campaigns that genuinely connect with audiences.

My background spans entrepreneurship — co-founding an experiential entertainment business — and education, giving me a unique lens on how to engage people and build brands that feel human.

Whether it's a TikTok strategy, a hologram campaign, or a landing page built from scratch — I bring creativity and precision to everything I do.

03 — Projects

Selected Work

Grand Egyptian Museum · Visual Campaign · 2026
Tutankhamun Hologram
Experience

Full visual campaign for the GEM's landmark Tutankhamun Hologram Exhibition — social media carousels, a dramatic "Coming Soon" poster, and the official entry ticket design. Tools: Adobe Photoshop & Illustrator.

Adobe PhotoshopIllustratorEvent CampaignSocial Media DesignPrint & Ticket Design

Facebook campaign post designed to drive awareness and ticket sales for the Tutankhamun Hologram Experience — launching 28 March 2026 at the Grand Egyptian Museum.

Widescreen carousel visual — family audience watching the Tutankhamun hologram come to life. Designed to communicate the immersive, cinematic quality of the experience across social media feeds.

Ticket Front
Ticket Back
Official Entry Ticket Design

Designed the complete double-sided entry ticket — branded front with hologram visuals and QR code, functional back with all event details and print information.

CategoryGEM Access · Egyptian · Adult
Price300.00 LE
Tour Date28 March 2026 · 08:00 AM
VenueGrand Egyptian Museum, Giza
"Coming Soon" Printed Poster

Dramatic large-format print poster — a child unlocking the holographic presence of Tutankhamun from a glowing golden artifact. Designed to create awe and drive curiosity ahead of launch.

The composition bridges ancient Egypt and futuristic technology, echoing the campaign's core message: Where legacy meets the wonders of the present.

Print Poster Art Direction Large Format GEM · 28.3.2026
